name: Pfeffernuesse (Pepper Nut Cookies)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon ground cloves (optional, for stronger flavor)
Juice and grated rind of 1 lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the flour and baking powder, salt, and spices. Sift together.
2. Gradually add sugar to the beaten eggs, stirring in the lemon juice and grated lemon rind.
3. Mix in the dry ingredients and chopped nuts until well combined.
4. Refrigerate for 2 hours before proceeding.
5. Roll out dough to about 1/2 inch thick and cut into 3-inch round shapes with a tiny cutter.
6. Place cookies on an ungreased baking sheet and refrigerate overnight.
7. Just before baking, place a drop of brandy on each cookie.
8. Bake at 300°F for 30 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
9. Allow to cool thoroughly before transferring to a tightly covered jar.
